zh.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon於1306年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德。她於1335年之前與Sir Peter le Veel在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1386年3月13日在英國英格蘭肯特貝克萊享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon于1306年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德。她于1335年之前与Sir Peter le Veel在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1386年3月13日在英国英格兰肯特貝克萊享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clevedon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Cleverdon in Devon.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon was born in 1306, in Charfield, Gloucestershire, England. She married Sir Peter le Veel before 1335, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 13 March 1386, in Berkeley, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon est née en 1306, à Charfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Peter le Veel avant 1335, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 mars 1386, à Berkeley, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon wurde 1306 in Charfield, Gloucestershire, England geboren. Sie hat vor 1335 in England Sir Peter le Veel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. März 1386 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Berkeley, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon è nata il nel 1306 nel Charfield, Gloucestershire, England. Lei sposato Sir Peter le Veel prima del 1335, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 marzo 1386, nel Berkeley, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedonは1306年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャーフィールドで生まれた。1335年以前にイギリスでSir Peter le Veelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1386年3月13日にイギリスイギリスケントバーケリーで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon(은)는 1306년 영국 그루스스터실르 처필드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1335년 이전 영국에서 Sir Peter le Veel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1386년 3월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 버켈리에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon nasceu em 1306, em Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Sir Peter le Veel antes 1335, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de março de 1386, em Berkeley, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon родилась в 1306 г. в местности чарфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Peter le Veel перед 1335 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 марта 1386 г. в местности биркели, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Katherine de Clevedon nació en 1306, en Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Sir Peter le Veel antes de 1335, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1386, en Berkeley, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
